name: insurance claims managers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims managers processing 10–20 claims/month, delayed reimbursements cause cash flow gaps. We monitor payment statuses and flag delays instead of manual tracking of claims statuses via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Delayed reimbursements causing cash flow gaps.
